SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.blowby

Class GasBlowbyAnalyzer

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.blowby.GasBlowbyAnalyzer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class GasBlowbyAnalyzer extends Object implements Serializable
Screening calculator for HP-to-LP gas blowby through a failed-open restriction (for example a level-control valve passing gas when its liquid seal is lost, or a high-pressure source bleeding into a low-pressure system).

The calculator estimates the gas mass rate through the fully open restriction using the isentropic nozzle relations (API 520 critical-flow form). If the downstream/upstream pressure ratio is below the critical ratio the flow is choked; otherwise a subcritical relation is used. The estimated blowby rate is compared against an optional downstream relief capacity to produce a screening verdict that supports the "More Pressure" HAZOP cause.

This is a screening tool: real valve trim, two-phase carry-over and transient inventory effects are not modelled. The specific-heat ratio and molar mass may be supplied directly or derived from a NeqSim fluid.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • GasBlowbyAnalyzer

      public GasBlowbyAnalyzer()
      Creates an empty gas blowby analyzer with default discharge coefficient 0.85.

  • Method Details

    • setUpstreamPressure

      public GasBlowbyAnalyzer setUpstreamPressure(double pressure, String unit)
      Sets the upstream (high-pressure source) pressure.
      Parameters:
      pressure - upstream pressure value; must be positive
      unit - pressure unit accepted by PressureUnit
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • setUpstreamTemperature

      public GasBlowbyAnalyzer setUpstreamTemperature(double temperature, String unit)
      Sets the upstream (high-pressure source) temperature.
      Parameters:
      temperature - upstream temperature value; must be above absolute zero
      unit - temperature unit accepted by TemperatureUnit
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • setDownstreamPressure

      public GasBlowbyAnalyzer setDownstreamPressure(double pressure, String unit)
      Sets the downstream (low-pressure protected system) pressure, typically the design or relief set pressure. Used to determine whether the flow is choked.
      Parameters:
      pressure - downstream pressure value; must be non-negative
      unit - pressure unit accepted by PressureUnit
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • setRestrictionArea

      public GasBlowbyAnalyzer setRestrictionArea(double area, String unit)
      Sets the effective flow area of the fully open restriction directly.
      Parameters:
      area - area value; must be positive
      unit - area unit, one of "m2", "cm2" or "mm2"
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • setRestrictionDiameter

      public GasBlowbyAnalyzer setRestrictionDiameter(double diameter, String unit)
      Sets the effective flow diameter of the fully open restriction. The area is computed as a circle.
      Parameters:
      diameter - diameter value; must be positive
      unit - length unit, one of "m", "cm", "mm" or "in"/"inch"
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • setDischargeCoefficient

      public GasBlowbyAnalyzer setDischargeCoefficient(double cd)
      Sets the discharge coefficient of the restriction.
      Parameters:
      cd - discharge coefficient; must be in (0, 1]
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • setSpecificHeatRatio

      public GasBlowbyAnalyzer setSpecificHeatRatio(double k)
      Sets the specific-heat ratio (Cp/Cv) of the gas directly.
      Parameters:
      k - specific-heat ratio; must be greater than 1
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • setMolarMass

      public GasBlowbyAnalyzer setMolarMass(double molarMass, String unit)
      Sets the molar mass of the gas directly.
      Parameters:
      molarMass - molar mass value; must be positive
      unit - molar mass unit, one of "kg/mol" or "g/mol"
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • setGas

      public GasBlowbyAnalyzer setGas(SystemInterface gas)
      Sets a NeqSim fluid from which the specific-heat ratio and molar mass are derived during analyze().
      Parameters:
      gas - the gas fluid; not null
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • setDownstreamReliefCapacity

      public GasBlowbyAnalyzer setDownstreamReliefCapacity(double capacity, String unit)
      Sets the downstream relief capacity that must absorb the blowby gas.
      Parameters:
      capacity - relief capacity value; must be non-negative
      unit - mass-rate unit, one of "kg/hr"/"kg/h" or "kg/s"
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • analyze

      public GasBlowbyResult analyze()
      Runs the gas blowby screening.
      Returns:
      an immutable GasBlowbyResult
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if mandatory inputs are missing or non-physical

    • validateInputs

      private void validateInputs()
      Validates that the mandatory inputs are present and physically consistent.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if a mandatory input is missing or non-physical

    • resolveSpecificHeatRatio

      private double resolveSpecificHeatRatio(List<String> warnings)
      Resolves the specific-heat ratio, preferring an explicit value and falling back to a NeqSim fluid.
      Parameters:
      warnings - list to append warnings to
      Returns:
      the specific-heat ratio to use

    • resolveMolarMass

      private double resolveMolarMass(List<String> warnings)
      Resolves the molar mass, preferring an explicit value and falling back to a NeqSim fluid.
      Parameters:
      warnings - list to append warnings to
      Returns:
      the molar mass in kg/mol to use

    • toMetre

      private static double toMetre(double value, String unit)
      Converts a length to metres.
      Parameters:
      value - length value; must be positive
      unit - length unit, one of "m", "cm", "mm", "in"/"inch"
      Returns:
      length in metres
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the value is non-positive or the unit is unsupported

    • toSquareMetre

      private static double toSquareMetre(double value, String unit)
      Converts an area to square metres.
      Parameters:
      value - area value; must be positive
      unit - area unit, one of "m2", "cm2", "mm2"
      Returns:
      area in square metres
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the value is non-positive or the unit is unsupported
